ema_fast.description: Fast EMA period for trend direction and momentum detection
ema_fast.impact: lower = more responsive but more noise in signal

ema_slow.description: Slow EMA period for trend baseline
ema_slow.impact: higher = smoother trend signal but more lag at inflections

rsi_low.description: RSI minimum threshold for long entry filter
rsi_low.impact: higher = fewer long entries, only higher-momentum setups qualify

rsi_high.description: RSI maximum threshold for short entry filter
rsi_high.impact: lower = fewer short entries, only higher-momentum setups qualify

rsi_long_max.description: RSI ceiling for long entries — prevents chasing overbought conditions
rsi_long_max.impact: lower = more conservative, blocks entries at extended overbought RSI levels

rsi_short_min.description: RSI floor for short entries — prevents fading deeply oversold conditions
rsi_short_min.impact: higher = more conservative, blocks short entries at extreme oversold RSI levels

volume_ratio_min.description: Volume must exceed 20-period MA by this multiple for confirmation
volume_ratio_min.impact: higher = fewer signals, higher volume conviction required per entry

tp_atr_multiplier.description: Take-profit distance expressed as ATR14 multiples from entry
tp_atr_multiplier.impact: higher = larger TP targets, lower win rate but higher avg win per trade

sl_atr_multiplier.description: Stop-loss distance expressed as ATR14 multiples from entry
sl_atr_multiplier.impact: lower = tighter SL, more frequent SL hits but smaller individual losses

min_confidence.description: Minimum signal confidence score required to fire an order
min_confidence.impact: higher = fewer but higher-quality signals, lower throughput

adx_trend_min.description: ADX threshold above which market is classified as TRENDING regime
adx_trend_min.impact: higher = stricter trending definition, more signals fall into RANGING

bb_width_threshold.description: Bollinger Band width threshold below which market is classified as RANGING
bb_width_threshold.impact: lower = stricter RANGING definition, fewer RANGING-eligible signals

max_hold_candles.description: Maximum candles to hold a position before forced timeout exit
max_hold_candles.impact: higher = more time for TP to hit, but more exposure to adverse moves

max_active_buckets.description: Maximum number of concurrent open positions across all pairs
max_active_buckets.impact: higher = more simultaneous trades, more total capital at risk

body_ratio_min.description: Minimum body-to-range ratio for impulse candle qualification
body_ratio_min.impact: higher = only strong conviction impulse candles qualify, fewer signals

wick_ratio_min.description: Minimum wick-to-body ratio for wick rejection pattern qualification
wick_ratio_min.impact: higher = only long wick rejections qualify, fewer but stronger reversals

compression_factor.description: ATR(5)/ATR(20) ratio threshold below which compression squeeze is detected
compression_factor.impact: lower = stricter compression requirement, fewer but cleaner breakouts

ema_spread_threshold.description: Minimum EMA fast/slow spread as fraction of price to confirm trending regime
ema_spread_threshold.impact: higher = stricter trending definition, prevents weak trend misclassification

atr_volatile_multiplier.description: ATR14/ATR50 ratio above which regime is classified as VOLATILE
atr_volatile_multiplier.impact: lower = more VOLATILE periods, higher = only extreme volatility qualifies

atr_quiet_multiplier.description: ATR14/ATR50 ratio below which regime is QUIET (all signals blocked)
atr_quiet_multiplier.impact: higher = more periods blocked as QUIET, fewer total signals fired

retracement_min.description: Minimum retracement fraction of trigger body for impulse_retracement pattern
retracement_min.impact: lower = shallower retracements accepted, more signals but weaker setups

retracement_max.description: Maximum retracement fraction of trigger body for impulse_retracement pattern
retracement_max.impact: higher = deeper retracements accepted, higher risk of trend invalidation

anomaly_volume_stddev.description: Volume standard deviations above mean required for anomaly_fade qualification
anomaly_volume_stddev.impact: higher = only extreme volume spikes qualify, fewer but more reliable fades

anomaly_price_atr.description: ATR multiples of single-candle move required for anomaly_fade qualification
anomaly_price_atr.impact: higher = only extreme price moves qualify, fewer anomaly fade entries

momentum_acceleration_candles.description: Consecutive same-direction accelerating candles required for momentum_continuation setup
momentum_acceleration_candles.impact: higher = stronger momentum confirmation required before entry
